opportunities.title: First creator onboarding ready

opportunities.title: NOIZYKIDZ teaching pipeline can launch with RSP_001 as founding teacher
opportunities.description: Revenue schema supports teaching relationships with auto-split. RSP_001's voice assets can be made available to students. Teacher royalty (15%) + voice contribution share creates sustainable income for educators.

reasoning_chain.thought: Teaching scenario tested: student nets $1.78 on $3.00, teacher gets $0.47. Sustainable.
NOIZYKIDZ has no code yet. This creates the first real product for the brand.
Kids learning through a teacher's voice creates deep community bond.

opportunities.compassion_notes: Teaching serves RSP_001's mission. Children benefit from creative education.

creator_readiness.compassion_assessment: RSP_001 is the architect of this system. Leading it is fulfillment, not burden.
